'''Dura Mater Settlement''' was a settlement on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that was filled with gullible buyers of [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. [[Stan (Jawa)|Stan]] and [[Fred Jawa]] often hit it.

{{Loc-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In real life, [[Wikipedia:dura mater|dura mater]] is one of the membranous layers that surround the brain and spinal cord.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|20|Fred Jawa (comic story)}}
